reviews.author: Neeraj Saxena
reviews.review_body: Don't know about others, but if you have sonal sachdeva as your ward's class incharge, you are blessed. She keeps super clear communication, regularly sends work accomplished last week, academic calander and other important circulars via emails and whatsapp as well.  I hope other class incharge also would be doing the same.  School overall is amazing, happy with that

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Block D,Sector 51
reviews.author: Saurrab Chandra Gupta
reviews.review_body:
One of the most commendable aspects of Manav Rachna is its holistic approach to education. Beyond academics, the school places a strong emphasis on character building, emotional intelligence, and social skills. Through various extracurricular activities and interactive workshops, students are encouraged to explore their interests, develop their talents.
Furthermore, teachers prioritizes individualized attention and personalized support for each student. Teachers take the time to understand the unique strengths, challenges, and aspirations of every child, ensuring that they receive the guidance and encouragement they need to reach their full potential. This personalized approach fosters a sense of confidence and self-belief in students, empowering them to overcome obstacles.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Block D,Sector 51
reviews.author: Sapna Kumari
reviews.review_body: MRIS is an excellent school with all required facilities and able teachers as well as support staff for holistic development of the child. The students participate and compete in all kinds to educational and extra curriculum activities with other schools resulting in competitive attitude and leadership qualities. I am very happy with the performance of the school.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Block D,Sector 51
reviews.author: yukta Dabla
reviews.review_body: Manav Rachna International School is an outstanding educational institution that offers a stimulating and supportive learning environment for students. The faculty and staff are highly experienced and dedicated to helping students reach their full potential. The curriculum is challenging and diverse, with a focus on 21st-century skills and technology. The school's state-of-the-art facilities provide students with a comfortable and well-equipped learning environment. Additionally, the school's emphasis on extracurricular activities, including sports, music, and community service, fosters students' personal growth and development. Overall, Manav Rachna International School is an excellent choice for parents seeking a top-notch education for their children.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Block D,Sector 51
reviews.author: Yukta Dabla
reviews.review_body: Manav Rachna International School is a top-notch educational institution that provides a world-class learning experience to its students. The school's faculty and staff are dedicated to their students' academic and personal growth. The curriculum is challenging and well-rounded, and the facilities are modern and equipped with the latest technology.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Block D,Sector 51
reviews.author: Parth Raj
reviews.review_body: Manav Rachna International School is a leading educational institution that offers an exceptional learning experience to students. The faculty and staff are highly trained and dedicated to their students' academic and personal growth. The curriculum is well-rounded and includes a wide range of extracurricular activities to develop students' talents and interests. The school's modern facilities and focus on technology ensure that students are well-prepared for the challenges of the 21st century.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Block D,Sector 51
reviews.author: Agam Chawla
reviews.review_body:
My experience with MRIS-Noida has been exceptional. The teachers have truly invested in my son’s education and his growth as  it integrates compassion into their teaching standards, emphasises the importance of values, and builds leaders through each of their classes and lessons.
Also, It provides great opportunities for co- curricular activities .
If you want to give your child a stellar education where they are nurtured to be their best, most confident selves then I encourage you to seek out this school.
